name: The Rock
reflection: When I feel weak, I can stand firm because He is my foundation.
hymn: I Know That My Redeemer Lives

name: The Light
reflection: Even in darkness, His light guides me and gives clarity to my path.

name: Surety
reflection: I can be confident in His promises; He is my surety before the Father.

name: Mercy
reflection: Through His mercy, I find forgiveness and hope every day.

name: The Good Shepherd
reflection: He leads me safely through life, caring for me personally.
hymn: I Heard the Voice of Jesus Say

name: Strength
reflection: His strength lifts me when I am weary and helps me endure trials.

name: The Savior
reflection: He saves me from sin and guides me to everlasting life.
hymn: O Savior, Thou Who Wearest a Crown

name: Redeemer
reflection: I am redeemed through His love and His atonement.

name: Bread of Life
reflection: He nourishes my soul and gives me eternal satisfaction.
hymn: Ye Who Are Called to Labor

name: Living Water
reflection: His living water refreshes me and quenches my spiritual thirst.

name: The Way
reflection: He is the path I follow to return to the Father.

name: The Truth
reflection: He is the ultimate source of truth in my life.

name: The Life
reflection: In Him I find life eternal and peace beyond the world.
hymn: I Know That My Redeemer Lives

name: The Alpha and Omega
reflection: He was there at the beginning and will be there at the end.

name: The King of Kings
reflection: He rules all things with love and justice.

name: The Lord Omnipotent
reflection: His power is unlimited and He strengthens me when I am weak.

name: The Almighty
reflection: He is my Almighty God who holds all things in His hands.

name: The Holy One of Israel
reflection: He sanctifies me and calls me to be holy.

name: The Lamb of God
reflection: He willingly takes upon Himself my sins and redeems me.
hymn: The Lord My Pasture Will Prepare

name: The Friend
reflection: He lays down His life for me and stands beside me as a true friend.
